title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming SMS during update
scenario: Verify that an incoming SMS during a Device Firmware Update (DFU) does not interrupt or break the update process.
steps: 1. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the target device.
2. While the DFU is in progress, send an incoming SMS to the device.
3. Monitor the DFU process to check if it continues running without interruption.
4. Wait for the DFU to complete.
5. Verify that the firmware update completed successfully (e.g., check firmware version, device functionality).
expected: The DFU process continues running and completes successfully despite the incoming SMS. The device firmware is updated correctly.
